positive: A stylized, central illustration of a mountain range bathed in the golden hour light. The peaks are depicted with crisp, layered silhouettes against a deep indigo sky. Foreground elements include minimalistic stylized pine trees and abstract celestial patterns (crescent moons, distant constellations). The overall aesthetic is modern bohemian travel, using a limited, earthy palette of burnt orange, deep teal, slate gray, and gold leaf accents. Perfect for apparel print, vector-like quality, high contrast, symmetrical composition, deep saturation, clean linework.
negative: blur, low resolution, amateur, artifacts, watermark, text, logo, dirty, noisy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poor symmetry, disfigured, jpeg artifacts
